Package org.rodinp.core.tests

Class AbstractRodinDBTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.AbstractRodinDBTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
AdapterFactoryTests, AncestryTests, HandleTests, IndexTests, LocationInclusionTests, ModifyingResourceTests, RefinementTests, RodinLocationTests, RunnableTests, TestRodinDB
public abstract class AbstractRodinDBTests extends Object
